tweets.topic: Vodafone Idea Limited Discloses TRAI Penalty of Rs 21.46 Lakh for Q1FY25
tweets.tweet: Vodafone Idea Limited faces a TRAI penalty of ₹21.46 lakh for Q1FY25 due to regulatory violations. Another fine in the pile for a telecom struggling to survive — your phone bills might just get worse before things improve. #VodafoneIdea #IndianTelecom

tweets.topic: Motorola Edge 70 Pro to launch on April 22: Check expected price, specs and more
tweets.tweet: Motorola Edge 70 Pro launching April 22 with flagship specs and competitive pricing in India. Finally a mid-range phone that doesn't feel like you're settling for last year's leftovers. #MotorolaEdge #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Vivo X300 Ultra, X300 FE India launch confirmed; May debut expected
tweets.tweet: Vivo X300 Ultra and X300 FE confirmed for India launch in May with flagship specs. Budget buyers finally get their turn while flagship enthusiasts debate if waiting was worth the hype. #Vivo #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Top Upcoming Smartphones in India 2026:Features, Launch Dates & Expected Prices
tweets.tweet: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra expected in India at ₹1,39,999 with AI-powered camera and 200MP sensor launching Q1 2026. Finally smartphones getting smarter, but your bank account needs artificial intelligence to afford them. #Samsung #IndianTech

Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra launches in India this week starting at ₹1,39,999 with AI-powered features. Great if you love cutting-edge tech, terrible if your bank account prefers staying in the black. #Samsung #IndianTech

tweets.topic: iPhone 18 Pro Latest Leaks: Check Leaked Colour Options, Expected Launch Date, Price in India, Design, Specifications, Features & More
tweets.tweet: iPhone 18 Pro leaked with new colors and ₹1,39,999 expected price launching next year with advanced specs. Apple's incremental upgrades continue — you'll upgrade anyway because everyone else did. #iPhone18Pro #AppleIndia

tweets.topic: iPhone 18 Pro Max launching soon: New Cherry colour variant, price, processor and expected upgrades
tweets.tweet: iPhone 18 Pro Max arriving with stunning Cherry colour, faster processor, and premium upgrades in India soon. Great if you love paying ₹1.5+ lakhs for a phone that does exactly what last year's model did. #Apple #iPhone18

tweets.topic: Apple iPhone 18 Pro: Expected design, display, colours options and launch timeline
tweets.tweet: Apple's iPhone 18 Pro expected to feature titanium design with advanced display tech and launch in September 2026. Finally, Apple might actually innovate instead of adding another camera lens — but your bank account should start saving now. #Apple #iPhone18Pro

tweets.topic: 'Samsung sees innovation, education as enabler of progress in India'
tweets.tweet: Samsung launched new educational initiatives across India focusing on digital literacy and innovation programs. Sounds great until you realize these programs are mostly in tier-1 cities while millions in smaller towns still struggle with basic internet access.

tweets.topic: Cracking Down: Operation Octopus 2.O Unveils Pan-India Cyber Fraud Network
tweets.tweet: Operation Octopus 2.0 exposed a pan-India cyber fraud network involving thousands of criminals running scams worth crores. Now maybe your neighbor's "tech support" call won't sound so convincing when you know the entire racket is being dismantled. #CyberCrime #IndianCyber
